title: What Can We Do About Wildfires? With Convective Capital’s Bill Clerico
title_zh: 我们可以为森林大火做些什么？与Convective Capital的比尔·克莱里科（ Bill Clerico ）
full_text: This week on No Priors, Sarah and Elad sit down with Bill Clerico, founder of Convective Capital, an early stage venture fund focused on technology-driven solutions for wildfire mitigation and climate resilience. The wildfires in Los Angeles have caused unprecedented property damage and immense hardship for countless individuals and families. This episode is devoted to diving into understanding what happened and what we can do in the future. Bill shares his insights into the increasing severity
